mapper.select: SELECT tp.id, tp.user_id, u.name, u.nickname, tp.bio, tp.self_intro, u.profile_img, COALESCE( (SELECT AVG(r.rating) FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = tp.user_id), 0 ) AS rating_avg, COALESCE( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = tp.user_id), 0 ) AS review_count, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(sg.name, ' - ', lf.name) SEPARATOR ', ') FROM lesson l2 JOIN subject s ON l2.subject_id = s.id JOIN subject_group sg ON s.group_id = sg.id JOIN language_field lf ON l2.field_id = lf.id WHERE l2.user_id = tp.user_id), '' ) AS subjects, COALESCE( (SELECT AVG(l3.price) FROM lesson l3 WHERE l3.user_id = tp.user_id), 0 ) AS price, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(tc.company_name, ' - ', tc.job_role) SEPARATOR ' | ') FROM tutor_career tc WHERE tc.user_id = tp.user_id), '' ) AS experience FROM tutor_profile tp JOIN users u ON tp.user_id = u.id WHERE tp.user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM user_auth WHERE auth = 'ROLE_TUTOR') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM lesson l WHERE l.user_id = tp.user_id AND l.status = 'OPEN' ) ORDER BY rating_avg DESC, review_count DESC

SELECT tp.id, tp.user_id, u.name, u.nickname, tp.bio, tp.self_intro, u.profile_img, tp.video_url, COALESCE( (SELECT AVG(r.rating) FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = tp.user_id), 0 ) AS rating_avg, COALESCE( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = tp.user_id), 0 ) AS review_count, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(sg.name, ' - ', lf.name) SEPARATOR ', ') FROM lesson l2 JOIN subject s ON l2.subject_id = s.id JOIN subject_group sg ON s.group_id = sg.id JOIN language_field lf ON l2.field_id = lf.id WHERE l2.user_id = tp.user_id), '' ) AS subjects, COALESCE( (SELECT AVG(l3.price) FROM lesson l3 WHERE l3.user_id = tp.user_id), 0 ) AS price, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(tc.company_name, ' - ', tc.job_role) SEPARATOR ' | ') FROM tutor_career tc WHERE tc.user_id = tp.user_id), '' ) AS experience, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT CONCAT( CASE WHEN tc.end_year IS NULL THEN CONCAT(tc.start_year, ' - 현재') ELSE CONCAT(tc.start_year, ' - ', tc.end_year) END, ':::', CONCAT(tc.company_name, ' - ', tc.job_role) ) ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.end_year, 9999) DESC, tc.start_year DESC SEPARATOR ' ||| ' ) FROM tutor_career tc WHERE tc.user_id = tp.user_id), '' ) AS career_timeline, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT te.school_name ORDER BY te.graduated_year DESC, te.start_year DESC SEPARATOR ' | ') FROM tutor_education te WHERE te.user_id = tp.user_id AND te.school_name != '학위 정보'), '' ) AS education_schools, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT te.degree ORDER BY te.graduated_year DESC, te.start_year DESC SEPARATOR ' | ') FROM tutor_education te WHERE te.user_id = tp.user_id AND te.degree != '학위 미기입력'), '' ) AS education_degrees, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT CONCAT( CASE WHEN te.graduated_year IS NULL THEN CONCAT(te.start_year, ' - 현재') ELSE CONCAT(te.start_year, ' - ', te.graduated_year) END, ':::', CONCAT(te.school_name, ' - ', te.degree) ) ORDER BY te.graduated_year DESC, te.start_year DESC SEPARATOR ' ||| ' ) FROM tutor_education te WHERE te.user_id = tp.user_id AND te.school_name != '학위 정보' AND te.degree != '학위 미기입력'), '' ) AS education_timeline, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(td.original_name), ''), '학력 증명서') ORDER BY td.created_at DESC SEPARATOR ' | ' ) FROM tutor_document td WHERE td.user_id = tp.user_id AND td.doc_type = 'EDUCATION'), '' ) AS education_documents, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(td.original_name), ''), '학위 증명서') ORDER BY td.created_at DESC SEPARATOR ' | ' ) FROM tutor_document td WHERE td.user_id = tp.user_id AND td.doc_type = 'DEGREE'), '' ) AS degree_documents, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(td.original_name), ''), '자격증') ORDER BY td.created_at DESC SEPARATOR ' | ' ) FROM tutor_document td WHERE td.user_id = tp.user_id AND td.doc_type = 'CERTIFICATE_TEXT'), '' ) AS certificates FROM tutor_profile tp JOIN users u ON tp.user_id = u.id WHERE tp.id = #{userId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM lesson l WHERE l.user_id = tp.user_id AND l.status = 'OPEN' )

SELECT tp.id, tp.user_id, u.name, u.nickname, tp.bio, tp.self_intro, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) AS rating_avg, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT r.id), 0) AS review_count, u.profile_img, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(sg.name, ' - ', lf.name) SEPARATOR ',') AS subjects, AVG(l.price) AS price, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(tc.company_name, ' - ', tc.job_role) SEPARATOR ' | ') AS experience FROM tutor_profile tp JOIN users u ON tp.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN review r ON r.booking_id IN ( SELECT b.id FROM booking b WHERE b.tutor_id = tp.user_id ) LEFT JOIN lesson l ON tp.user_id = l.user_id AND l.status = 'OPEN' LEFT JOIN subject s ON l.subject_id = s.id LEFT JOIN subject_group sg ON s.group_id = sg.id LEFT JOIN language_field lf ON l.field_id = lf.id LEFT JOIN tutor_career tc ON tp.user_id = tc.user_id WHERE tp.user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM user_auth WHERE auth = 'ROLE_TUTOR') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM lesson l WHERE l.user_id = tp.user_id AND l.status = 'OPEN' ) AND sg.name = #{subject} GROUP BY tp.id, tp.user_id, u.name, u.nickname, tp.bio, tp.self_intro, tp.profile_img ORDER BY rating_avg DESC, review_count DESC

SELECT tp.id, tp.user_id, u.name, u.nickname, tp.bio, tp.self_intro, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) AS rating_avg, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT r.id), 0) AS review_count, u.profile_img, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(sg.name, ' - ', lf.name) SEPARATOR ',') AS subjects, AVG(l.price) AS price, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(tc.company_name, ' - ', tc.job_role) SEPARATOR ' | ') AS experience FROM tutor_profile tp JOIN users u ON tp.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN review r ON r.booking_id IN ( SELECT b.id FROM booking b WHERE b.tutor_id = tp.user_id ) LEFT JOIN lesson l ON tp.user_id = l.user_id AND l.status = 'OPEN' LEFT JOIN subject s ON l.subject_id = s.id LEFT JOIN subject_group sg ON s.group_id = sg.id LEFT JOIN language_field lf ON l.field_id = lf.id LEFT JOIN tutor_career tc ON tp.user_id = tc.user_id WHERE tp.user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM user_auth WHERE auth = 'ROLE_TUTOR') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM lesson l WHERE l.user_id = tp.user_id AND l.status = 'OPEN' ) AND l.price >= #{minPrice} AND l.price <= #{maxPrice} GROUP BY tp.id, tp.user_id, u.name, u.nickname, tp.bio, tp.self_intro, tp.profile_img ORDER BY rating_avg DESC, review_count DESC

SELECT tp.id, tp.user_id, u.name, u.nickname, tp.bio, tp.self_intro, u.profile_img, COALESCE( (SELECT AVG(r.rating) FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = tp.user_id), 0 ) AS rating_avg, COALESCE( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = tp.user_id), 0 ) AS review_count, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(sg.name, ' - ', lf.name) SEPARATOR ', ') FROM lesson l2 JOIN subject s ON l2.subject_id = s.id JOIN subject_group sg ON s.group_id = sg.id JOIN language_field lf ON l2.field_id = lf.id WHERE l2.user_id = tp.user_id), '' ) AS subjects, COALESCE( (SELECT AVG(l3.price) FROM lesson l3 WHERE l3.user_id = tp.user_id), 0 ) AS price, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(tc.company_name, ' - ', tc.job_role) SEPARATOR ' | ') FROM tutor_career tc WHERE tc.user_id = tp.user_id), '' ) AS experience FROM tutor_profile tp JOIN users u ON tp.user_id = u.id WHERE tp.user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM user_auth WHERE auth = 'ROLE_TUTOR') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM lesson l WHERE l.user_id = tp.user_id AND l.status = 'OPEN' ) AND (u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR tp.bio LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%')) ORDER BY rating_avg DESC, review_count DESC
